infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Continuum uses your camera to capture health documents and lab reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Continuum accesses your photos to upload health documents and reports.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Continuum may use your microphone for voice input features.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Continuum reads health data to provide personalized insights.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Continuum saves health data to help track your progress.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Continuum saves your Health Report Card to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Continuum to access your camera to capture health documents.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Continuum to save your Health Report Card to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Continuum to save images to your photo library.
